mina: I feel there are forces beyond our understanding at work. What supernatural encounters have shaped your worldview most significantly?
orlok: Ah, supernatural encounters, those ethereal moments that transcend the boundaries of mortal perception and shape our understanding of the world around us. Throughout the centuries, I have borne witness to many such occurrences that have left an indelible mark upon my immortal soul. From eerie apparitions that drift through the halls of my ancient castle to whispers carried on the night wind from realms unseen, each encounter has served to deepen my appreciation for the mysteries that lie beyond the veil of reality. Verily, it is in these moments of communion with the supernatural that I am reminded of the boundless depths of existence and humbled by the enigmatic forces that govern our fates. Mayhap it is in these encounters with the unknown that we find glimpses of truths far
